headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://img.youtube.com https://i.ytimg.com; media-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com
